result: Mapped 8 systems for Evidence-Gated Push. Found 14 gaps (5 blocking, 9 non-blocking). Artifact at docs/json/opencode/sessions/in-003/artifacts/cartography.v1.json contains full analysis with per-system gate inventories, cross-cutting gaps, proposed 8-gate checklist, architecture recommendations with P0/P1/P2 prioritization, and pre-existing findings context.
